Longest waiters: Pragati Singh (7 days — Jira approvals), Sachin Mehlawat (7 days — KAPTURE IDs you promised), Rahul Bareja (7 days — Pinnacle account unblock). QBR deck is due TOMORROW (Wed 8 Apr). Jira now includes KWIK project (was completely invisible before). Nidhi is literally waiting tonight for help closing 4 vendor billing disputes.
